case_title: CALIFORNIA SERVICE BUREAU INC VS. YASSINE CHERFOUNI et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-05-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-05-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $62.04 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA SERVICE BUREAU INC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA SERVICE BUREAU INC AS TO DEFENDANT CHERFOUNI, YASSINE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-15-2009
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA SERVICE BUREAU INC SERVED JUN-16-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHERFOUNI, YASSINE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $280.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT CHERFOUNI, YASSINE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA SERVICE BUREAU INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHERFOUNI, YASSINE $2,235.92 PRINCIPAL, $558.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $578.28 INTEREST, $280.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,652.20, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CHERFOUNI, YASSINE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT CHERFOUNI, YASSINE
